Container.Name: pocket-dev
Container.Overview:
Browser-accessible terminal hosting a coding-agent CLI. Choose your provider via PROVIDER (claude-code | codex). Same image ships both CLIs; deploy multiple instances on different ports to run them side-by-side.
Click the WebUI button above to access the terminal in your browser. The selected CLI starts automatically.
Authentication: Provide API_KEY (mapped to the provider's expected env var) or run the provider's login command (`claude login` / `codex login`) on first use. Auth persists in the matching config volume.

Config.Name: PROVIDER
Config.Description: Which coding-agent CLI to launch. claude-code uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + cdspo defaults; codex uses OPENAI_API_KEY + cdy defaults.

Config.Name: API_KEY
Config.Description: Optional: API key for the selected provider. Mapped to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY when PROVIDER=claude-code, OPENAI_API_KEY when PROVIDER=codex. Leave blank and run the provider's login command on first use.

Config.Name: SHELL_CMD
Config.Description: Override the command launched in the tmux session. Leave blank to use the provider default (claude-code → 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions --model opus[1m]'; codex → 'cdy').

Config.Name: RESPAWN_CMD
Config.Description: Override the command used to respawn the pane on kill/+New. Leave blank to use the provider default (claude-code → 'cdspo'; codex → 'cdy').

Config.Name: Workspace
Config.Description: Directory where claude-code will work with your files

Config.Name: Claude Config
Config.Description: Claude configuration and settings directory (used when PROVIDER=claude-code)

Config.Name: Codex Config
Config.Description: Codex auth + config directory; persists `codex login` (used when PROVIDER=codex). For a second instance, point this to a separate appdata path.

Config.Name: Claude JSON Config
Config.Description: Persists MCP server configs and settings across container restarts

Config.Name: Google Workspace Credentials
Config.Description: Persists Google Workspace OAuth credentials across container restarts

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket for container management (read-only). Allows Claude to restart containers like dispatcharr.
